steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Execute whoami, id, and hostname to determine current user context and system identity
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for post-exploitation checklist
steps.expected_output: User account details, group memberships, and target system hostname

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Dump password hashes from /etc/passwd on Linux or use 'net user' on Windows
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: User account list with hash availability for offline cracking

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Capture network configuration using 'ip addr' on Linux or 'ipconfig' on Windows
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Network interface information showing IP addresses and network segments

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Review listening ports and established connections using netstat
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Network socket information revealing services and internal network access

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: List all running processes with 'ps aux' on Linux or 'tasklist' on Windows
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Process inventory showing running services and potential privilege escalation opportunities

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Search for SUID binaries on Linux systems that could enable privilege escalation
steps.expected_output: List of SUID binaries with excessive permissions for escalation attempts

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Check shell history, configuration files, and SSH keys for additional credentials
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Discovered hardcoded credentials, SSH keys, and history of previous commands
